nodes.label: Immutable public-Git intake and isolated no-egress Stage B worker orchestration.
Remove a private work tree, including read-only Git/Docker files on Windows.
Give the Docker client only connection/runtime state, never buyer or worker secr
Extract only bounded regular Git metadata emitted by the trusted fetcher image.
Fetch immutable Git objects inside a kernel-capped tmpfs container.
Fetch one immutable GitHub subdirectory and freeze verified regular-file bytes.
Re-hash a frozen source and reject mutation before every worker invocation.
Run the static inspector in a pinned, least-privilege Docker container.
